CommandLine.Parameter: "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Physical\X20CP1684\Hardware.hw" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\X20CP1684\X20CP1684\ashwac.br" -L "AsIecCon: V*, astime: V*, operator: V*, runtime: V*, standard: V*" -c "X20CP1684" -B 6.7.6 -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)" -v 1.0.0

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Physical\X20CP1684\Hardware.hw" -v 1.0.0 -c "X20CP1684" -sysconf -Z "OpcUaCs: 6.7.0, mappView: 6.7.0, UnitSystem: n.d, TextSystem: n.d, RemanentData: n.d, IEC: n.d, FMUExport: n.d, AAS: n.d" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\X20CP1684\X20CP1684\sysconf.br" -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)" -s "X20CP1684" -B 6.7.6

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Physical\X20CP1684\Hardware.hw" -v 1.0.0 -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\X20CP1684\X20CP1684\asfw.br" -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)" -c "X20CP1684" -zip -s "X20CP1684" -firmware -Z "OpcUaCs: 6.7.0, mappView: 6.7.0, UnitSystem: n.d, TextSystem: n.d, RemanentData: n.d, IEC: n.d, FMUExport: n.d, AAS: n.d" -B 6.7.6

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Physical\X20CP1684\Hardware.hw" -v 1.0.0 -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\X20CP1684\X20CP1684\ashwd.br" -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)" -c "X20CP1684" -zip -s "X20CP1684" -hwd -Z "OpcUaCs: 6.7.0, mappView: 6.7.0, UnitSystem: n.d, TextSystem: n.d, RemanentData: n.d, IEC: n.d, FMUExport: n.d, AAS: n.d" -B 6.7.6

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Physical\X20CP1684\Hardware.hw" "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Physical\X20CP1684\X20CP1684\IoMap.iom" -arconfig -C "/COMT=2500 /AM=* /SDT=5 /IP=192.168.0.3 /PT=11169" -D "/IF=tcpip" -c "X20CP1684" -v 1.0.0 -Z "OpcUaCs: 6.7.0, mappView: 6.7.0, UnitSystem: n.d, TextSystem: n.d, RemanentData: n.d, IEC: n.d, FMUExport: n.d, AAS: n.d" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\X20CP1684\X20CP1684\arconfig.br" "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\X20CP1684\X20CP1684\ChannelConfiguration.xml" "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\X20CP1684\X20CP1684\ReActionTechnologyConfiguration.xml" -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)" -s "X20CP1684" -B 6.7.6

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\X20CP1684\X20CP1684\ClockSigna\ClockSigna.ox" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\X20CP1684\X20CP1684\ClockSigna.br" -v 1.0.0 -f "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\X20CP1684\X20CP1684\NT.ofs" -offsetLT "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Binaries\X20CP1684\X20CP1684\LT.ofs" -M IA32 -B 6.7.6 -G V11.3.0 -extConstants -d "runtime: V* - V*,AsIecCon: V* - V*" -r Cyclic1 -p 2 -s "Wizualizacja.ClockSignal" -L "AsIecCon: V*, astime: V*, operator: V*, runtime: V*, standard: V*" -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)"

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\X20CP1684\X20CP1684\Tanks\Tanks.ox" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\X20CP1684\X20CP1684\Tanks.br" -v 1.0.0 -f "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\X20CP1684\X20CP1684\NT.ofs" -offsetLT "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Binaries\X20CP1684\X20CP1684\LT.ofs" -M IA32 -B 6.7.6 -G V11.3.0 -extConstants -d "runtime: V* - V*,AsIecCon: V* - V*" -r Cyclic4 -p 2 -s "Sterowanie.Tanks" -L "AsIecCon: V*, astime: V*, operator: V*, runtime: V*, standard: V*" -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)"

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\CaseWeek_user.apj" -t "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Binaries" -c "X20CP1684" -i "$(AS_PATH)" -S "X20CP1684" -A "X20CPx68x" -swFiles "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Physical\X20CP1684\X20CP1684\Cpu.sw" -Z "OpcUaCs: 6.7.0, mappView: 6.7.0, UnitSystem: n.d, TextSystem: n.d, RemanentData: n.d, IEC: n.d, FMUExport: n.d, AAS: n.d" -C "/COMT=2500 /AM=* /SDT=5 /IP=192.168.0.3 /PT=11169" -D "/IF=tcpip" -M IA32 -T SG4
